posts.purpose: スタンプ制作データ ①
posts.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Morning coral and sunrise gold with fresh white. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco (stylish 41-year-old woman, sleek bob haircut) in natural beige linen tunic and wide-leg pants, standing in a relaxed morning pose with one hand raised in a small gentle wave. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits at her feet looking up with adoring round eyes. Composition: full body, front view, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』in warm coral lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.
posts.quote: 💎 第11弾・⑪-01 | 朝 | 普段着（リネンチュニック＋ワイドパンツ、ナチュラルベージュ）
